name: Gates Industrial Corporation plc
description: Gates Industrial Corporation plc is a leading manufacturer of highly engineered power transmission and fluid power solutions. The company designs and manufactures a broad portfolio of proprietary products used in diverse replacement channel and original equipment applications across various end markets, including construction, agriculture, energy, automotive, transportation, and general industrial. Headquartered in Denver, Colorado, but incorporated in the United Kingdom, Gates serves customers globally with its critical components that reduce downtime and improve operational efficiency.
